title: The Creaking Statue
description: Replaces The Creaking with SCP-173: "The Statue."
body:
![SCP-173 stands in the corner of a room, blood stains the floor, and chains hang from the ceiling.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cba5f498692273a2d5d0b48ed2fd51dbb04e17ec.png)
## Please maintain direct eye contact with SCP-173.

A resource pack that replaces The Creaking mob with SCP-173: "The Statue." 
The Creaking spawn egg also has an updated name and color scheme.

### Requirements
This resource pack requires Optifine, or another equivalent, such as EMT (Entity Model Features) and ETF (Entity Texture Features).

### Credits

- SCP-173 created by Wesley "Moto42" Williams. [SCP-173 on SCP Wiki](https://scp-wiki.wikidot.com/scp-173)
- "Untitled" Statue (SCP-173's likeness) created by Izumi Kato. [Kato's Website](https://izumikato.com/)
- Shaderpack used in Screenshot #1 in Gallery is "Cursed Fog" by LoLip_p. [Link to Shaderpack](https://modrinth.com/shader/cursed-fog)
